sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὅτεὅτεἥτετοτε

- Transliteration: Hote

- Phonetic: hot'-eh

- Definition:

1. when whenever, while, as long as

- Origin: from G3739 and G5037

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: From G3739 and G5037; at which (thing) too that is when: - after (that) as soon as that when while. Second form also feminine third form also neuter and fourth form simply the article G3588 followed by G5037; so written (in some editions) to distinguish them from G3752 and G5119.
